name: transformers
tagline: Loads Hugging Face Hub models and runs pipeline inference, text generation, and Trainer fine-tuning across NLP, vision, audio, and.
verdict: Solid library-usage skill: sharp trigger/negative-trigger description, pinned reproducible installs from the standard PyPI registry, careful HF token handling (no hardcoding, narrow scopes, env-var guidance), compact SKILL.md with bulk material split into references, and a version field. Main gap: no failure-path guidance for auth errors, missing packages.

highlights.summary: No guidance anywhere for auth failure, gated-model access denial, missing packages, or training/inference errors — happy-path only.
